name: Creole Crab
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy skillet, sauté mushrooms in half the butter until cooked through; remove and reserve.
2. In the same skillet, melt remaining butter. Add onion and garlic, cooking until soft.
3. Stir in tomatoes and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
4. Mix in cream or half-and-half and flour, stirring until smooth. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
5. Add mushrooms, pimiento, red pepper, and crabmeat. Heat thoroughly.
6. Serve over hot cooked rice or in heated pastry shells.
